message:
perf(pager): add get_shared page cache method + use in SimpleTransaction::get_page

V1.2: Add ShardedPageCache::get_shared() that returns PageData directly,
replacing the get_copy() → Vec<u8> → PageData::from_vec() pattern in
SimpleTransaction::get_page().

Note: get_shared currently still does a to_vec() internally because the
shard stores PageBuf not PageData. The real optimization is at the caller
site where get_copy+from_vec was TWO allocations (Vec + Arc) — now it's
one combined allocation. Full zero-copy requires caching PageData inside
shard entries (tracked as future enhancement).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
